01 = Yes, patient has BOTH observable and unobservable stasis ulcers.

M1332_NUM_STAS_ULCR M1332 Current Number of (Observable) Stasis Ulcers This field indicates the current number of (observable) stasis wounds. 01 = One
02 = Two
03 = Three
04 = Four or more CHAR 2 x x x x x x
